notes.title: Helping Verbs
notes.content: Modals such as 'may', 'can', 'should', 'must', and 'need to' are used to express different functions in a sentence.

notes.title: Spices
notes.content: Different spices have various textures, tastes, and parts of the plant that give us these spices.

notes.title: Tulsi (Holy Basil)
notes.content: Tulsi is an herb with many benefits, which can be used to control fever, cough, and cold among other things.

notes.title: Modal Verbs
notes.content: Each modal verb has a different function in a sentence such as compulsion, suggestion, necessity, etc.

notes.title: Fenugreek
notes.content: Fenugreek seeds can be soaked overnight to get the benefits of this spice.

notes.title: Black Pepper
notes.content: Black pepper has a spicy taste and is obtained from the fruit/seeds of the plant.

notes.title: Clove
notes.content: Clove can help control cough and cold, but no direct method of using it is provided.

notes.title: Taste of Spices
notes.content: Spices have different tastes such as bitter, sweet, sour, salty, spicy, etc.

notes.title: Texture of Spices
notes.content: Different spices have various textures such as rough, soft, silky, etc.

notes.title: Modal Verb Functions
notes.content: Each modal verb has a different function in a sentence such as necessity, compulsion, suggestion, advice, etc.

facts.fact: Tulsi (Holy Basil) is an herb that has many benefits.
Fenugreek seeds can be soaked overnight to get the benefits of this spice.
Black pepper has a spicy taste and is obtained from the fruit/seeds of the plant.
Clove can help control cough and cold, but no direct method of using it is provided.
Spices have different tastes such as bitter, sweet, sour, salty, spicy, etc.
Different spices have various textures such as rough, soft, silky, etc.
Modal verbs are used to express different functions in a sentence.
Tulsi (Holy Basil) is an herb that can be used to control fever, cough, and cold among other things.
The modal verb 'must' is used to express compulsion.
Different spices have various parts of the plant that give us these spices.
